# Agent-Based Virtue Epistemology

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** f9eb8a56-1526-4854-b2eb-be7918e8bdeb
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Is knowledge without causal connection to truth really knowledge?](is-knowledge-without-causal-connection-to-truth-really-knowledge-antithesis-b4980065-cae0-4077-9e30-18949eb28ab3.md)

## Content

**Knowledge is a true belief generated by the agent's intellectual character**, **Intellectual virtue is defined by the motivation to pursue and appreciate truth**, **A person knows a proposition if the belief is true and results from virtuous motives**, **Knowledge involves being disposed to recognize reasons for the truth of a proposition**
